Glucose.title: Clinical Diabetes & Plasma Glucose Interventions
recommendations: For patients with fasting plasma glucose concentrations above 126 mg/dL: Initiate immediate clinical evaluation for Type 2 Diabetes.
Recommend dietary carbohydrate restriction, continuous glucose tracking, and consultation regarding formal medical therapy.
Encourage 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity weekly to naturally enhance cell insulin sensitivity.

BMI.title: Metabolic Management & Obesity Guidelines
recommendations: For patients with a Body Mass Index (BMI) exceeding 30.0 kg/m²: Prioritize a structural daily caloric deficit.
Incorporate structured resistance training weekly to preserve lean muscle mass during fat loss cycles.
Schedule comprehensive metabolic screenings to actively monitor for underlying insulin resistance.

Age.title: Geriatric & Age-Compounded Risk Protocols
recommendations: Advanced age (above 45 years) compounds with existing sedentary lifestyle factors to accelerate pancreatic beta-cell dysfunction.
Patients in older cohorts with borderline high-risk metrics should receive screening intervals every 6 months.
